elements.name: Description
texts:
Tievetooey is in the Electoral Division of Templecarn. Tievetooey is in the Civil Parish of Templecarn. We don't know what Barony Tievetooey is in. Tievetooey is in Co. Donegal

Tievetooey is on Logainm.ie: Tievetooey.

Tievetooey has an area of:

    -5,124,289 m² / 512.43 hectares / 5.1243 km²
    -1.98 square miles
    -1266.24 acres / 1266 acres, 0 roods, 38 perches

Nationwide, it is the 1410th largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 168th largest townland
